meta.title: OneWord — Say it in five.
meta.description: A daily word game where the whole world gets the same word and describes it in exactly 5 words. The community votes. The most creative wins. Play free on iOS and web.
meta.og_description: The daily game for creative minds. One word. Five words to describe it. The community votes. The most creative wins.
meta.privacy_description: How OneWord handles your data. What we collect, what we don't, and your rights.
meta.terms_description: Terms of use for the OneWord daily word game.

hero.badge: The daily game for creative minds
hero.subtitle: Every day, the whole world gets the same word. Describe it in exactly five words. The community votes. The most creative wins.

how.label: How it works
how.title: Three steps. Thirty seconds.
how.step1_desc: Every day at midnight, a new word drops. The same word for everyone on earth. Could be simple. Could be abstract. Could be spicy.
how.step2_desc: Exactly five words. Not four. Not six. Be clever. Be funny. Be poetic. The constraint is what makes it a game — anyone can be witty in a paragraph.
how.step3_desc: Your description goes head-to-head against others. Tap to vote. The best descriptions rise. See where you ranked. Share your result. Come back tomorrow.

live.label: Today's results
live.title: Today's word:
live.descriptions_count: {count} description{count, plural, one {} other {s}} and counting
live.empty_title: Today's word is waiting for its first descriptions. Be the first!

features.label: Why you'll love it
features.title: Not just a word game.
features.f1_desc: No endless scrolling. One word, five words, done. The perfect micro-break that actually makes you feel clever.
features.f2_desc: Play every day. Build your streak. Miss a day, it resets. Simple motivation that keeps you coming back.
features.f3_desc: Your description competes against thousands. See where you rank. Aim for the crown. Brag to your friends.
features.f4_desc: Beautiful result cards designed for Instagram, WhatsApp, and Twitter. Your creativity deserves an audience.
features.f5_desc: Unlike every other word game, there's no correct solution. Funny beats formal. Clever beats correct. You decide.
features.f6_desc: Everyone plays the same word every day. Compare your mind against millions of others. See how the world thinks.

cta.title: Today's word is waiting.
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of players describing the world in exactly five words.

email_capture.label: BE THE FIRST TO PLAY
email_capture.title: Get notified when we launch.
email_capture.subtitle: Drop your email. We'll tell you the moment OneWord is live. No spam, just one email.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.subtitle: Your privacy matters. Here's exactly what we collect, why, and what we don't.
privacy.s1_p1: When you create a OneWord account, we collect your email address, a username you choose, and an optional profile avatar. This is the minimum we need to create your account and let you play.
privacy.s1_p2: When you use the app, we collect the descriptions you submit for daily words, your votes on other players' descriptions, your gameplay statistics (streak count, total plays, ranking history), and your language preference.
privacy.s1_p3: To send you notifications, we store your device's push notification token. This is a random identifier — it is not your phone number or any personal identifier.
privacy.s1_p4: If you add friends, we store the connection between your account and theirs.
privacy.s2_p1: We do not collect your real name, phone number, physical address, precise location, contacts list, browsing history, financial information, or any biometric data. We do not read your messages or access your camera, microphone, or files.
privacy.s3_p1: We use your data to: operate the game (showing daily words, recording descriptions, calculating rankings), display leaderboards, maintain your streak, connect you with friends, send push notifications you've opted into, and improve the app experience.
privacy.s3_p2: We do not sell your personal data to anyone. We do not use your data for advertising targeting. We do not share your data with third parties for their marketing purposes.
privacy.s4_p1: Contractual necessity: Processing your account data, game submissions, votes, and statistics is necessary to provide the OneWord service you signed up for.
privacy.s4_p2: Legitimate interest: We process data for leaderboards, ranking calculations, and app improvement, where our interests don't override your rights.
privacy.s4_p3: Consent: Push notifications are only sent with your opt-in consent, which you can withdraw at any time.
privacy.s5_p1: OneWord uses the following third-party services to operate:
privacy.s5_supabase: Supabase: Hosts our database and authentication system. Your account data and game data are stored on Supabase's servers.
privacy.s5_expo: Expo: Handles push notification delivery. Your push notification token is processed through Expo's notification service.
privacy.s5_cookies: Our website hosted on Vercel may use essential cookies and basic analytics to ensure the site functions correctly. No tracking cookies are used for advertising purposes.
privacy.s6_p1: Your data is stored securely on Supabase's cloud infrastructure with encryption at rest and in transit. Access to the database is protected by Row Level Security policies ensuring users can only access their own data.
privacy.s6_p2: We retain your data for as long as your account is active. If you delete your account, all your personal data including your descriptions, votes, statistics, and friend connections are permanently deleted from our systems.
privacy.s7_p1: You can view all data associated with your account within the app (profile, statistics, descriptions).
privacy.s7_p2: You can delete your account at any time from the app's profile settings. This permanently removes all your data.
privacy.s7_p3: You can disable push notifications at any time through the app settings or your device settings.
privacy.s7_p4: You can change your username, avatar, and language preference at any time.
privacy.s7_p5: If you are located in the European Economic Area (EEA), you have additional rights under GDPR including the right to access, rectify, port, and erase your personal data. To exercise these rights, contact us at
privacy.s8_p1: OneWord is not directed at children under the age of 13 (or the minimum digital consent age in your jurisdiction, such as 16 in some EU member states). We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under the age of 13 (or the minimum digital consent age in your jurisdiction, such as 16 in some EU member states). If we discover that a child under the age of 13 (or the minimum digital consent age in your jurisdiction, such as 16 in some EU member states) has created an account, we will promptly delete their account and all associated data. If you believe a child under the age of 13 (or the minimum digital consent age in your jurisdiction, such as 16 in some EU member states) is using OneWord, please contact us at
privacy.s9_p1: Our services are hosted on infrastructure that may be located outside your country of residence. By using OneWord, you consent to the transfer of your information to countries that may have different data protection laws than your own.
privacy.s10_p1: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. If we make significant changes, we will notify users through the app or by email. Continued use of OneWord after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.
privacy.s11_p1: If you have questions about this privacy policy or your data, contact us at:

terms.title: Terms of Use
terms.subtitle: The rules of the game. Simple and fair.
terms.s1_p1: By creating an account or using OneWord, you agree to these terms. If you don't agree, please don't use the app. It's that simple.
terms.s2_p1: OneWord is a daily word game. Each day, a word is presented and you describe it in exactly five words. Your description is submitted to a community voting system where other players vote on descriptions in head-to-head matchups. Rankings are determined by an algorithmic rating system based on these votes.
terms.s3_p1: You must be at least 13 years old (or the minimum digital consent age required by law in your country) to create an account and use OneWord. You must provide a valid email address and choose a username to create an account. You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account. One account per person. Creating multiple accounts to manipulate voting or rankings is prohibited.
terms.s3_p2: Your username must not impersonate another person, contain offensive or hateful language, or infringe on any trademark.
terms.s4_p1: When you submit a description, you grant OneWord a worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free licence to display, distribute, and use that description within the game and for promotional purposes (such as displaying top descriptions on the website or in marketing materials). This licence continues even after account deletion for any descriptions that were publicly displayed, cached, or archived prior to deletion. Upon account deletion, we will remove your descriptions from active display, but residual copies may persist in backups for a limited period.
terms.s4_p2: You retain ownership of your descriptions. You can delete your account and all associated content at any time.
terms.s4_p3: You are responsible for the content you submit. Descriptions must not contain hate speech or discrimination based on race, ethnicity, gender, sexual orientation, religion, or disability. Descriptions must not contain threats of violence, harassment, or targeted abuse toward any individual or group. Descriptions must not contain sexually explicit content. Descriptions must not contain personal information about other people (names, addresses, phone numbers). Descriptions must not be used for spam, advertising, or commercial promotion. Descriptions must not infringe on intellectual property rights.
terms.s4_p4: We reserve the right to remove any description that violates these guidelines and to suspend or terminate accounts that repeatedly violate them.
terms.s5_p1: OneWord, including its name, logo, design, ranking algorithm, and all associated software, is the intellectual property of OneWord. Nothing in these terms grants you any right to use our branding, code, or proprietary systems outside of normal app usage.
terms.s6_p1: Rankings are determined algorithmically based on community votes. We do not guarantee any specific ranking outcome. We reserve the right to adjust the ranking algorithm at any time to improve fairness and the overall game experience.
terms.s6_p2: Attempting to manipulate rankings through fake accounts, coordinated voting, bots, or any other means is strictly prohibited and will result in immediate account termination.
terms.s7_p1: You can send and receive friend requests from other players. You can remove friends at any time. We do not share your friends list publicly — only mutual friends can see the connection.
terms.s8_p1: OneWord is provided on an "as is" basis. We aim to keep the service running 24/7 but do not guarantee uninterrupted availability. The daily word resets at midnight UTC. We reserve the right to perform maintenance, updates, or modifications at any time.
terms.s9_p1: OneWord offers both free and paid features. Free features may include advertising in the future. Paid features (subscriptions or one-time purchases) are processed through the Apple App Store, Google Play Store, or our website. Refund policies are governed by the respective platform's terms.
terms.s10_p1: We may suspend or terminate your account if you violate these terms, attempt to manipulate the game, harass other users, or use the service in any way that is harmful to other users or to OneWord. You may delete your account at any time through the app settings.
terms.s11_p1: You agree to indemnify and hold OneWord harmless from any claims, damages, or expenses arising from content you submit, your violation of these terms, or your violation of any third party's rights.
terms.s12_p1: OneWord is a game and is provided for entertainment purposes. To the maximum extent permitted by law, we are not liable for any indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service.
terms.s13_p1: These terms are governed by the laws of the United Kingdom. Any disputes will be resolved in the courts of England and Wales.
terms.s14_p1: We may update these terms from time to time. Significant changes will be communicated through the app or by email. Continued use constitutes acceptance.
terms.s15_p1: Questions about these terms? Contact us at:
